news.headline: ‘Privilege for none’: Pakistan calls for abolition of UNSC veto power, rejects new permanent seats

<p>Reaffirming its consistent policy, Pakistan has called for the abolition or severe restriction of the veto power and strongly opposed any expansion of permanent membership in the United Nations Security Council (UNSC).</p>
<p>The stance was expressed by Pakistan’s Permanent Repr

news.headline: Italy suspends long-standing defence agreement with Israel
news.summary: Italy suspended the renewal of a 20-year-long defence agreement with Israel, following recent tensions between them.
